meanings.usage: 指为他人做家务或服务的人
形容动作或生活节奏缓慢、不紧不慢
形容房屋或建筑结构不规整，延伸很长
形容非常干净，没有污点或灰尘
常与over连用，表示管理或主持某事
指人的性格或行为不稳定、容易改变
指工作努力、勤奋的程度
修饰动词，表示事情发生得让人意外
正式用语，指欢笑和快乐的情绪
表示虽然做某事但内心不愿意
指对某人或某事失去幻想
形容花费大量金钱或物品
stack的过去式，指整齐地堆起

examples.en: She would not be able to air her views on her favourite topic.
examples.zh: 她将无法就她最喜欢的话题发表意见。

examples.en: She was sentimentally attached to this house.
examples.zh: 她对这座房子怀有深厚的感情。

examples.en: She always referred to them as 'the shifting population'.
examples.zh: 她总称他们为'流动的人口'。

examples.en: They came and went with such frequency.
examples.zh: 他们来来去去非常频繁。

phrases.phrase: to the end of her days

examples.en: She carried on an unrelenting search to the end of her days.
examples.zh: 她至死都在不懈地寻找理想的仆人。

examples.en: She was put in charge of the domestic staff.
examples.zh: 她被安排负责管理家务人员。

examples.en: Not only was the meal well below the usual standard, but Bessie seemed unable to walk steadily.
examples.zh: 不仅饭菜远不如平时，而且贝齐看起来连路都走不稳。

examples.en: The pudding narrowly missed my aunt.
examples.zh: 布丁险些砸到我的姑妈。

examples.en: Aunt Harriet was reluctantly came to the conclusion that Bessie was drunk.
examples.zh: 姑妈哈丽雅特不得不得出结论：贝齐喝醉了。

examples.en: The guests had a difficult time trying to conceal their amusement.
examples.zh: 客人们费了好大劲才忍住没笑出来。

grammar.title: 虚拟语气 (Subjunctive Mood) - 与现在事实相反
grammar.definition: 用于表达与事实相反的假设情况，主句用would+动词原形，从句用一般过去式
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + 过去式(be用were), 主语 + would + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用来表达与现实相反的假设，常用于表达遗憾或不可能实现的愿望

examples.en: If she were alive today she would not be able to air her views.
examples.zh: 如果她今天还活着，她就不能就她最喜欢的话题发表意见了。

examples.en: If I were you, I would accept the offer.
examples.zh: 如果我是你，我会接受这个提议。

grammar.title: Not only...but (also) 引起的倒装句
grammar.definition: 当not only放在句首时，它后面的句子要使用部分倒装语序
grammar.structure: Not only + 助动词/be动词/情态动词 + 主语 + 谓语...but (also) + 句子
grammar.usage: 强调两个事实或情况，通常用于正式写作和演讲中增强语气

examples.en: Not only was the meal well below the usual standard, but Bessie seemed unable to walk steadily.
examples.zh: 不仅饭菜远不如平时，而且贝齐看起来连路都走不稳。

examples.en: Not only did he finish his work, but he also helped others.
examples.zh: 他不仅完成了自己的工作，还帮助了别人。

grammar.title: While 引导的让步状语从句
grammar.definition: while 在此意为"虽然；尽管"，引导让步状语从句
grammar.structure: While + 主语 + 谓语..., 主句
grammar.usage: 用于引出让步或对比关系，while从句通常放在句首

examples.en: While she always criticized the fickleness of human nature, she carried on an unrelenting search.
examples.zh: 虽然她总是批评人性的善变，但她仍在不懈地寻找。

examples.en: While I understand your point, I don't agree with you.
examples.zh: 虽然我理解你的观点，但我不同意。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is a good thing + 主语 + 过去式

original.en: It is a good thing my aunt Harriet died years ago.
original.zh: 好在哈丽雅特姑妈很多年前就去世了。

imitations.en: It is a good thing you came early.
It is a good thing we brought an umbrella.

sentencePatterns.pattern: No matter how + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语

original.en: No matter how many guests were present, the great house was always immaculate.
original.zh: 无论有多少客人来访，这座大宅总是干干净净的。

imitations.en: No matter how hard he tried, he couldn't open the door.
imitations.zh: 无论他怎么努力，都打不开那扇门。

imitations.en: No matter how expensive the dress was, she bought it.
imitations.zh: 无论那件裙子多贵，她都买了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 名词/动名词, 主语 + 谓语

original.en: After her departure, Aunt Harriet discovered that there were piles of empty wine bottles.
original.zh: 在她离开后，姑妈哈丽雅特发现有一堆空酒瓶。

imitations.en: After finishing his homework, he went to play football.
imitations.zh: 完成作业后，他去踢足球了。

imitations.en: After the meeting, everyone left the room quietly.
imitations.zh: 会议结束后，大家安静地离开了房间。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + so + 形容词/副词 + that + 句子

original.en: The room was so dark that I couldn't see anything.
original.zh: 房间太暗了，我什么也看不见。

imitations.en: She spoke so quickly that I couldn't follow her.
imitations.zh: 她说得太快了，我跟不上。

imitations.en: It was so hot that we decided to stay indoors.
imitations.zh: 天太热了，我们决定待在室内。
